caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact St Maarten Today
caribbean.paragraph: St. Maarten is experiencing moderate easterly winds at 20 kt with wave heights reaching 5.1 ft and an 8-second swell period from the east. Rain probability is high at 82%, creating wet conditions and challenging marine operations, while Grenada sees lighter winds near 13 kt and less impactful weather.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Dubrovnik Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Dubrovnik is experiencing widespread heavy rain with 100% rain probability accompanied by moderate winds up to 16 kt and wave heights reaching 5.5 ft from the SSW. Naples sees lighter winds at 13 kt with less than 10% rain probability, making Dubrovnik the primary concern for maritime operations in the Central Mediterranean.
